description_long: This is a modern, multi-story urban house with three visible levels, each featuring spacious balconies with glass railings and outdoor seating. The facade combines light beige and gray panels with large windows, providing a sleek and contemporary appearance. The ground floor includes a garage door and a main entrance, both facing a tiled sidewalk and driveway. The upper floors have open-plan living spaces, visible through the transparent balcony barriers, and the top floor includes a partially open terrace. The rear and side walls are mostly solid, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy. The overall design is boxy and geometric, with flat roofs and clean lines typical of modern urban residential architecture.
description: A modern, three-story urban house with glass balconies, large windows, and a flat roof, featuring a mix of beige and gray panels. The front includes a garage and main entrance facing a tiled driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing three stories, glass balconies, large windows, garage door, and main entrance facing the tiled driveway.
description_view_1: Left side view with mostly solid walls, minimal windows, and the driveway extending to the side.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by plain, windowless walls and a small section of the interior visible at the top.
description_view_3: Right side view highlighting the large balcony, glass railings, and the driveway extending along the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door adjacent to a garage, both facing the tiled driveway, with no porch or decorative columns.
